hard_filters: NSE EQ series · 20d avg turnover >= Rs 3.0cr
5+ quarters of reported financials (missing data = excluded, never guessed)
vetoes_automated: V3: D/E > 3.0 with declining CFO (caps grade at C)
criteria.valuation_regime: PE scored relative to live universe median, not absolute
criteria.queue_rules: composite >= 7.0, no vetoes, not on leaderboard; Lane 1 = RVol >= 1.5x on an up day
criteria.radar_gates: universe: Smallcap 250 + Microcap 250 · mcap <= 25000cr · rev CAGR >= 15.0% · PAT CAGR >= 18.0% · D/E <= 0.6 · ROE >= 15.0% · above 200DMA · NOT over-extended (<= 35% above 200DMA, <= 80% 6m return) · framework coverage >= 85% · volume integrity (200+ sessions, no volume concentration, no zero-volume days) · no vetoes · signal age tracked, stale after 30 sessions
criteria.data_honesty: prices split/bonus-adjusted · coverage penalty -2.0 x missing share · promoter % display-only (yfinance field is not SEBI promoter category - verify NSE SHP) · degraded runs refuse to publish · attribution follows exits and counts unmatched names
criteria.leaderboard: manual ACE deep-dives only, entry bar 7.48, max 17

regime.note: valuation scored vs universe median PE; Nifty trend + India VIX shown as orthogonal context (fix #10)

attribution.method: both return endpoints from this run's split-adjusted series; delisted/exited names measured to last trade (terminated); unmatched names counted, never silently dropped

grade_note: Any triggered hard veto caps grade at C. V1/V2/V4-V7 require manual verification (checklist on each card).
disclaimer: Educational purposes only. Not investment advice. Not SEBI-registered research. Framework scores are quantified proxies of published investor philosophies computed from reported data; qualitative judgment is not automated. Suggested weights are a risk-budget illustration, not a recommendation. Verify independently before acting.

portfolio.sizing_note: inverse-volatility weights, capped at 8% - risk illustration only
